---
title: "Energy poverty in the Netherlands"
author: "Matthijs, David, Wessel, Quint, Zakaria"
date: "2026-06-08"
output: html_document
---
````markdown

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Hier laden we alle pakketten die nodig zijn voor de opdracht
require(tidyverse)
require(rmarkdown)
require(yaml)
library(tidyr)
library(writexl)
library(readxl)
```markdown
# Part 1: Identify a Social Problem
## 1.1 Describe the Social Problem
Hier gaan jullie straks typen waarom energie-armoede een probleem is in Nederland.

# Part 2: Data Sourcing
## 2.1 Load in the data
## 2.2 Provide a short summary of the dataset(s)
## 2.3 Describe the type of variables included

# Part 3: Quantifying
## 3.1 Data cleaning
## 3.2 Generate necessary variables
## 3.3 Visualize temporal variation
## 3.4 Visualize spatial variation
## 3.5 Visualize sub-population variation
## 3.6 Event analysis

# Part 4: Discussion
## 4.1 Discuss your findings

# Part 5: Reproducibility
## 5.1 Github repository link
## 5.2 Reference list
```
